title: Resolution No. 6-26 — Adopting the Village of Greenville Comprehensive Outdoor Recreation Plan 2026–2030
notes: Adopts the five-year outdoor recreation plan for Village parks and open space.

title: Resolution No. 7-26 — Approving a Special Exception for a CSM in Comprehensive Plan Tier II Parcels #111077403 and 111077402
notes: Approves a Certified Survey Map (CSM) special exception for two Tier II parcels.

title: Resolution No. 13-26 — Approving an Amended Project Plan and Boundaries for TID District No. 1, Village of Greenville
notes: Amends the Tax Increment Financing (TIF) District No. 1 project plan and boundary.

title: Ordinance No. 6-26 — Amending Chapter 23 Fire Commission
notes: Amends Village Code Chapter 23 relating to the Fire Commission structure or powers.

title: Ordinance No. 2-26 — Amending the Village of Greenville Zoning Map
notes: Updates the official Village zoning map, likely reflecting rezoning of one or more parcels.
